title: Lead Revenue Manager at Impresario Entertainment

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Impresario Entertainment
jsonLd.description:
We at Impresario Entertainment are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Impresario Entertainment:
Impresario Entertainment is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment!
